title: Don Cross
text: Home * People * Don Cross Don Cross [1] Don Cross , an American software engineer, majored in electrical engineering at the University of Central Florida [2] . He is author of the open source chess program Chenard and the open source JavaScript chess engine Flywheel [3] . His personal website covers various topics on science , mathematics , software and electronics [4] . Contents 1 Publications 2 Postings 3 External Links 4 References Publications [ edit ] Don Cross ( 2013 ). Fundamentals of Ray Tracing .
